productDisplayName: Kenneth Cole Women Silver Dial Watch
description: kenneth cole New york is manufactured using the highest quality materials and craftsmanship. The incorporation of both traditional and contemporary design philosophy result in a unique and modern product. Choose this watch to display your sophisticated and discerning taste in accessories.
